name: Accenture plc
lede: Accenture runs 22 centers across thirteen Indian cities. Gandhinagar, Bengaluru, Mumbai, Gurugram, Hyderabad, Chennai, Noida, Coimbatore, Kolkata, Pune, Bhubaneswar, Indore and Jaipur, covering GBS, R&D, CoE and IT, built over 36 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Accenture office in India. We map 22, across thirteen cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Accenture plc GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Accenture runs 22 verified centers across 13 Indian cities (Gandhinagar, Bengaluru, Mumbai, Gurugram, Hyderabad, Chennai, Noida, Coimbatore, Kolkata, Pune, Bhubaneswar, Indore, Jaipur), covering GBS, R&D, CoE and IT. about.description: Accenture's India footprint covers Gandhinagar, Bengaluru, Mumbai, Gurugram, Hyderabad, Chennai, Noida, Coimbatore, Kolkata, Pune, Bhubaneswar, Indore and Jaipur, spanning GBS, R&D, CoE and IT. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting, HR and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 825 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Accenture operate in India?
faq.a: Accenture operates 22 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Accenture have centers in?
faq.a: Accenture's India footprint includes Gandhinagar and 12 additional cities.

faq.q: What types of centers does Accenture run in India?
faq.a: Accenture runs GBS and 3 additional center types in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Accenture's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for Accenture's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Accenture's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Accenture's India centers, across Finance and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
